explanations.1: This line tells the markdown linter to ignore a specific rule (MD033) that would normally complain about using HTML in markdown files — the file uses HTML tables below, so it needs this exception.
explanations.7: This line embeds a dynamic GitHub stats card as an image; it pulls your repository and contribution statistics from an external service and displays them visually.
explanations.17: These HTML comments act as markers where an automated tool will insert your blog posts — the tool looks for these exact comment boundaries and fills in the content between them.
